tests.title: Verify signature with kid-resolved key
tests.given: A signed JWT whose header kid matches a key in the key set
tests.then: The JWS signature is verified against the resolved key and a typed claims set is returned

tests.title: Check registered claims
tests.when: The token is validated with the expected issuer and audience
tests.then: iss matches exactly, aud contains the expected value, exp/nbf bound the validity window and iat is present

tests.title: Reject alg:none unconditionally
tests.given: An unsigned JWT with header alg "none"
tests.then: Validation is rejected before any signature step with an explicit alg-none error

tests.title: Validate nonce when expected
tests.given: A signed JWT carrying a nonce claim
tests.when: The token is validated with WithExpectedNonce set
tests.then: A nonce mismatch is rejected and a matching nonce passes

tests.title: Reject expired token
tests.given: A signed JWT whose exp is in the past beyond the clock skew
tests.then: Validation fails with an expiry error

tests.title: Reject not-yet-valid token
tests.given: A signed JWT whose nbf is in the future beyond the clock skew
tests.then: Validation fails with a not-before error

tests.title: Reject wrong issuer
tests.given: A signed JWT whose iss differs from the expected issuer
tests.when: The token is validated with WithExpectedIssuer set
tests.then: Validation fails with an issuer-mismatch error

tests.title: Reject wrong or absent audience
tests.given: A signed JWT whose aud does not contain the expected audience
tests.when: The token is validated with WithExpectedAudience set
tests.then: Validation fails with an audience error

tests.title: Reject bad signature
tests.given: A signed JWT whose signature does not verify against the resolved key
tests.then: Validation fails with a signature error

tests.title: kid not in cached JWKS triggers forced refresh
tests.given: A signed JWT whose kid is absent from the cached key set
tests.then: A JWKS forced refresh is performed and key resolution retried before failing

tests.title: Tolerate clock skew
tests.given: A signed JWT whose exp is marginally in the past within the configured skew
tests.when: The token is validated with WithClockSkew set
tests.then: Validation succeeds because the skew tolerance covers the difference

tests.title: Enforce custom required claims
tests.given: A signed JWT missing a claim named in WithRequiredClaims
tests.then: Validation fails identifying the missing required claim

tests.title: Reject token missing iat
tests.given: A signed JWT without an iat claim
tests.then: Validation fails because iat is required
